result.stdout:
A net global tool helping to retrieve package(s), function(s), procedure(s) and parameter(s) infos from oracle.

Usage: OracleCli [command] [options]

Options:
  -s|--settings  Show settings information.
  -v|--version   Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  Function       List oracle functions.
  Info           Get oracle infos.
  Lock           List oracle locks.
  Object         List oracle objects.
  Package        List oracle packages.
  Parameter      List oracle procedure/function parameters.
  Procedure      List oracle procedures.
  Schema         List oracle schemas/users.
  Session        List oracle sessions.
  Source         Get oracle sources.
  Table          List oracle tables.

Run 'OracleCli [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
A net global tool helping to retrieve package(s), function(s), procedure(s) and parameter(s) infos from oracle.

Usage: OracleCli [command] [options]

Options:
  -s|--settings  Show settings information.
  -v|--version   Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  Function       List oracle functions.
  Info           Get oracle infos.
  Lock           List oracle locks.
  Object         List oracle objects.
  Package        List oracle packages.
  Parameter      List oracle procedure/function parameters.
  Procedure      List oracle procedures.
  Schema         List oracle schemas/users.
  Session        List oracle sessions.
  Source         Get oracle sources.
  Table          List oracle tables.

Run 'OracleCli [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
List oracle functions

List oracle functions.

Usage: OracleCli Function [options]

Options:
  -d|--db       Database name
  -u|--schema   Schema/User name
  -p|--pkg      Package name
  -n|--name     Function name
  --filter      Filter keyword
  -m|--max      Max items
                Default value is: 30.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
List oracle locks

List oracle locks.

Usage: OracleCli Lock [options]

Options:
  -d|--db       Database name
  -u|--schema   Schema/User name
  -t|--time     Minimum blocking time in minutes
                Default value is: 5.
  -m|--max      Max items
                Default value is: 30.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
